codeReview.summary: Scoped changes fully match the feature contract: recommendation validation now includes .escalate, operator-ui-worker SKILL daemon test filter matches BurnBar* naming, and handoff guidance now requires commitId verification via git rev-parse --verify plus git show --name-only.

sharedStateObservations.observation: operator-ui-worker SKILL does not mention the mission-documented CI fallback for app tests in this environment, which led to timed test commands and an ad-hoc build-for-testing fallback in the worker run.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/operator-ui-worker/SKILL.md:21-23 requires direct xcodebuild test flow; mission AGENTS.md (Known Pre-Existing Constraints) says non-CI app tests may hang and CI=true mode is acceptable; worker-transcripts.jsonl entry for session aa28a6fc-4bfd-4d62-a7d8-525260956777 includes 'Command timed out after 300 seconds' for scripts/test-openburnbar-app.sh and then used xcodebuild build-for-testing.

summary: Review passed. The implementation covers all required behavior for misc-m2-authoring-quality-hardening with no code defects found in the scoped diff; one non-blocking shared-state observation was recorded about test fallback guidance clarity in the operator-ui-worker skill.
